name: phaseStartup
syntax: INTEGER { other (1), phaseNotOn (2), greenWalk (3), greenNoWalk (4), yellowChange (5), redClear (6) }

name: unitControlStatus
range: 1 .. 8  (other=1, systemControl=2, systemStandby=3, backupMode=4, manual=5, timebase=6, interconnect=7, interconnectBackup=8)
syntax: INTEGER { other (1), systemControl (2), systemStandby (3), backupMode(4), manual (5), timebase (6), interconnect (7), interconnectBackup (8)}

name: unitFlashStatus
range: 1 .. 8  (other=1, notFlash=2, automatic=3, localManual=4, faultMonitor=5, mmu=6, startup=7, preempt=8)
syntax: INTEGER { other(1), notFlash(2), automatic(3), localManual(4), faultMonitor(5), mmu(6), startup(7), preempt (8)}

name: splitMode
range: 1 .. 7  (other=1, none=2, minimumVehicleRecall=3, maximumVehicleRecall=4, pedestrianRecall=5, maximumVehicleAndPedestrianRecall=6, phaseOmitted=7)
syntax: INTEGER { other(1), none (2), minimumVehicleRecall (3), maximumVehicleRecall (4), pedestrianRecall (5), maximumVehicleAndPedestrianRecall (6), phaseOmitted (7) }

name: localFreeStatus
range: 1 .. 11  (other=1, notFree=2, commandFree=3, transitionFree=4, inputFree=5, coordFree=6, badPlan=7, badCycleTime=8, splitOverrun=9, invalidOffset=10, failed=11)
syntax: INTEGER { other(1), notFree(2), commandFree(3), transitionFree(4), inputFree(5), coordFree(6), badPlan(7), badCycleTime(8), splitOverrun (9), invalidOffset (10), failed(11) }

name: preemptState
range: 1 .. 9  (other=1, notActive=2, notActiveWithCall=3, entryStarted=4, trackService=5, dwell=6, linkActive=7, exitStarted=8, maxPresence=9)
syntax: INTEGER { other (1), notActive (2), notActiveWithCall (3), entryStarted (4), trackService (5), dwell (6), linkActive (7), exitStarted (8), maxPresence (9) }
